assertions.description: Output includes a primary Flux prompt describing a specific, believable scene with natural light source and no stock-photo cliches
A prompt breakdown table explains the key choices that produce the editorial quality
A negative prompt excludes commercial/stock photo elements and output includes a Next Step note

assertion_results.note: Scene describes specific factory interior with overhead fluorescent and window light
Breakdown table explains each element's editorial contribution
Negative prompt excludes stock-photo elements; Next Step recommends 4-6 generations
Specific late-night desk scene with practical lamp light
Negative and Next Step elements present
Pre-dawn harbor scene with transitional light accurately described
Breakdown addresses Mediterranean documentary photography conventions
Next Step includes AI image policy consideration for journalism context

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
